title: Agent Workbench Engineering: Why Capable Models Still Fail

questions.question: What does the lesson identify as the root cause of agent failures on real tasks?
options: Workbench failures: missing surfaces around the model, not LLM limitations
questions.explanation: The model is not wrong about Python; it is wrong about the work. Surfaces around the model are missing.
questions.question_zh: 本课认为 agent 在真实任务上失败的根本原因是什么？
options_zh: Workbench 失败：模型周围的支撑面缺失，而不是 LLM 自身的局限
questions.explanation_zh: 模型并不是不会 Python；它只是不了解这件工作。它周围的支撑面缺了。

questions.question: What are the seven workbench surfaces the lesson names?
options: Instructions, state, scope, feedback, verification, review, handoff
Train, eval, deploy, monitor, retrain, scale, retire
Plan, act, reflect, refine, debate, vote, ship
Read, write, exec, fork, exit, wait, kill
questions.explanation: The seven surfaces are instructions, state, scope, feedback, verification, review, handoff.
questions.question_zh: 本课给出的七个 workbench 支撑面是什么？

questions.question: Which is NOT one of the eight distributed-systems primitives the lesson maps surfaces to?
questions.explanation: The eight primitives are function, worker, trigger, runtime, HTTP/RPC, queue, session persistence, authorization policy.
questions.question_zh: 以下哪个不是本课把支撑面映射到的 8 个分布式系统原语之一？
questions.explanation_zh: 8 个原语是 function、worker、trigger、runtime、HTTP/RPC、queue、session 持久化、authorization policy。

questions.question: What did Vercel's reported harness change move success rate from and to?
options: 80% to 100%, by deleting 80% of the agent's tools
questions.explanation: Deleting 80% of tools moved Vercel's agent from 80% to 100% success.
questions.question_zh: Vercel 报告的 harness 改造把成功率从多少提到了多少？
options_zh: 从 80% 提到 100%，靠的是删掉 agent 80% 的工具
questions.explanation_zh: 删掉 80% 的工具，让 Vercel 的 agent 从 80% 提升到 100%。

questions.question: What does Terminal Bench 2.0 demonstrate about model vs harness?
options: Same model moved from outside top 30 to rank five by changing only the harness
questions.explanation: LangChain's Anatomy of an Agent Harness: same model, harness change, 25+ rank jump.
questions.question_zh: Terminal Bench 2.0 显示了模型 vs harness 的什么关系？
options_zh: 同一个模型仅靠改 harness，从前 30 之外冲到第 5 名
questions.explanation_zh: LangChain 的 Anatomy of an Agent Harness：同一模型，改 harness，名次跳了 25+。

questions.question: What does the lesson recommend doing when you hear new harness vocabulary?
options: Translate back to primitives (function, worker, trigger, runtime, HTTP/RPC, queue, persistence, policy) before adopting
Wait for OpenAI to standardize it
questions.explanation: Reason from primitives, not vendor taxonomies; the vocabulary changes but the engineering does not.
questions.question_zh: 当听到新的 harness 词汇时，本课建议怎么做？
options_zh: 采用之前先把它翻译回原语（function、worker、trigger、runtime、HTTP/RPC、queue、persistence、policy）
questions.explanation_zh: 从原语出发推理，而不是从厂商分类法；词汇会变，工程不变。

questions.question: Where does chat history sit relative to the workbench?
options: Chat is the system of record
Chat is volatile; the repo is the system of record
questions.explanation: The loop closes on the state file, not on chat history.
questions.question_zh: 聊天历史相对 workbench 处于什么位置？
options_zh: 聊天是易失的；repo 才是真理之源
questions.explanation_zh: 循环闭合在状态文件上，而不是聊天历史上。
